tasks.description: Removed broken @guildai-services/brathwaite~cpm-vercel-v2 npm integration (404) and restored logInteractionToNeon() using raw fetch(), mirroring existing postRunToNeon() pattern. Updated package.json in both agent/ and cpm-report-agent/.
Fixed GitHub Actions log-sessions.yml: added null-summary guard to skip in-progress sessions, and removed agent/cpm-report-agent nested git repo from outer repo index (git rm --cached + .gitignore).

Diagnosed Guild Babel SpreadElement errors (column 16 fingerprint, line-offset tracking) and replaced all object/array spread operators in agent.ts and cpm-report-agent/agent.ts with Object.assign() and .concat(). Moved 'use agent' directive inside run() body. Published as version 1.0.12.
